name: valykays-claude-code-plugins
description: ValyKays' Claude Code Plugins — supporting plugins for the ValyKays skill collection.

plugins.name: synthesis-author
plugins.description: Single-agent plugin: consume a code diff or implementation plan plus N notes files of flagged issues, verify each claim against the actual code, and produce a per-finding implementation spec. Designed to be dispatched by orchestrating skills (e.g. debate-review, debate-plan).
